text.title: Gcp Networking Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-networking methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: topology-decision
step.action: Decide Shared VPC vs multi-VPC; record peering / NCC plan.

step.name: provision-core
step.action: Create host project VPC + subnets; enable Cloud NAT.

step.name: edge
step.action: Provision Global HTTPS LB + Cloud Armor + (optional) Cloud CDN.

step.name: private-services
step.action: Wire Private Service Connect / PSA for Cloud SQL etc.

step.name: observability
step.action: Enable Flow Logs; ship to Cloud Logging.
